items.title: Iran War Live Updates: U.S. and Iran Edge Closer to Wider War After U.S. Soldiers Killed
items.summary: The United States was said to be sending more warplanes to the Middle East, a move that was already in the works before Iranian fire killed two soldiers in Jordan.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Russia launches major ballistic missile attack on Ukrainian cities
items.summary: Eight people die and dozens are injured as several cities are hit by missile and drone attacks, while Kyiv continues its own assault on Russian infrastructure.

items.title: At least 50 Malian soldiers killed in rebel-jihadist attack
items.summary: The attack on the Army convoy leaving Anefis occurred on July 18, following weeks of fighting with both sides attempting to take control
